title: aspidium submarginale
intro: Aspidium submarginale, also known as the Asplenium submarginale, is a species of fern that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Aspidium submarginale include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, or used topically as a poultice or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
